title: Senior SEO Specialist at Zepto South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Zepto South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zepto South Asia Partners family as a SEO Specialist in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zepto South Asia Partners:
Zepto South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zepto South Asia Partners!
